deep_dive.title: Graph-ESBMC-PLC: Formal Verification of Graphical PLCopen XML Ladder Diagram Programs Using SMT-Based Model Checking
deep_dive.abstract: PLCopen XML defines two encoding formats for IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram programs: a textual encoding using <rung> elements, and a graphical encoding that represents rung logic as a directed graph of localId/refLocalId connections. ESBMC-PLC supported the textual format but parsed graphical exports from CONTROLLINO, Beremiz, and OpenPLC Editor into an empty GOTO intermediate representation, causing vacuous verification success. This paper presents Graph-ESBMC-PLC, which closes this gap with a DFS-based graphical LD resolver. The resolver traverses the connection graph from leftPowerRail to each coil, extracts rung paths as Boolean contact conjunctions, and applies a three-tier I/O inference scheme. Ordering coils by rightPowerRail connectionPointIn sequence ensures SET coils process before RESET coils, matching IEC scan-cycle semantics. The graphical-to-IR conversion leaves the ESBMC backend unchanged. Validation on 3 graphical LD programs from CONTROLLINO/OpenPLC Editor shows all produce full GOTO IR with nondeterministic inputs and rung logic, versus the empty IR previously. All 3 verify SAFE at k=2 under 70ms. The 11 textual LD benchmarks are fully preserved, with no regression. Two Beremiz examples with no LD content or unsupported timer semantics are reported as discovered limitations. Artifact at Zenodo (DantasCordeiro2026graphical, doi:10.5281/zenodo.20699856).
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: SMT-based formal verification of hardware PLC programs
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于SMT的硬件PLC程序形式验证
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于SMT的硬件PLC程序形式验证
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于SMT的硬件PLC程序形式验证
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Extends ESBMC-PLC to verify graphical PLC ladder diagrams via DFS-based resolution, achieving sound formal verification for industrial controllers.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对图形化PLC梯形图程序的验证空白，本文提出Graph-ESBMC-PLC，采用深度优先搜索解析连接图，提取路径布尔表达式，并结合SMT模型检查进行形式验证。该方法解决了现有工具无法处理图形格式导致空验证的问题。实验表明该方法能正确验证工业PLC程序，为硬件控制器形式验证提供了实用技术。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对图形化PLC梯形图程序的验证空白，本文提出Graph-ESBMC-PLC，采用深度优先搜索解析连接图，提取路径布尔表达式，并结合SMT模型检查进行形式验证。该方法解决了现有工具无法处理图形格式导致空验证的问题。实验表明该方法能正确验证工业PLC程序，为硬件控制器形式验证提供了实用技术。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: hardware verification techniques for digital circuits

deep_dive.title: The Correctness Illusion in LLM-Generated GPU Kernels
deep_dive.abstract: Benchmarks for LLM-generated GPU kernels (KernelBench, TritonBench, GEAK) score correctness through fixed-shape, small-sample allclose-style checks. The number of inputs varies between benchmarks. The shape, dtype, and tolerance are fixed for each kernel. We test that oracle empirically. We construct a controlled corpus of 24 Triton and CPU stand-in kernels (15 correct controls and 9 LLM-style buggy variants seeded with documented transcription errors) and re-evaluate it under op-schema-aware seeded fuzzing with a high-precision (fp64) CPU reference and per-(op, dtype) absolute tolerances. The seeded oracle flags 9 of 9 buggy kernels and passes 15 of 15 correct controls, at zero precision cost on controls. We extend the corpus to 26 ops (adding a flash-attention pair) and re-run the same protocol on five GPU classes (RTX 3060, A10, L40S, A100 SXM4, H100 NVL). The verdicts are identical across all five GPUs: 10 of 10 illusions caught and 16 of 16 controls clean. The corpus result is about LLM-style transcription bugs that the allclose-on-one-shape oracle certifies as correct, not about the bug rate of any specific deployed LLM. Every flagged failure replays byte-for-byte from a stored seed.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: fuzzing for LLM-generated GPU kernel correctness verification
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 模糊测试用于LLM生成GPU内核的正确性验证
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 模糊测试用于LLM生成GPU内核的正确性验证
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 模糊测试用于LLM生成GPU内核的正确性验证
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Constructs a controlled corpus of LLM-generated GPU kernels and applies op-schema-aware seeded fuzzing with high-precision CPU reference to detect bugs.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有LLM生成GPU内核的基准测试仅通过固定形状小样本检查，未能发现细粒度错误。该论文构建了包含15个正确和9个有缺陷内核的受控语料库，并采用操作模式感知的种子模糊测试，以高精度CPU参考和绝对容差进行验证。该方法成功检测出所有9个有缺陷内核且无误报，揭示了LLM生成GPU内核正确性评估的漏洞，并提供了更可靠的验证方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有LLM生成GPU内核的基准测试仅通过固定形状小样本检查，未能发现细粒度错误。该论文构建了包含15个正确和9个有缺陷内核的受控语料库，并采用操作模式感知的种子模糊测试，以高精度CPU参考和绝对容差进行验证。该方法成功检测出所有9个有缺陷内核且无误报，揭示了LLM生成GPU内核正确性评估的漏洞，并提供了更可靠的验证方案。

deep_dive.title: Process-Verified Reinforcement Learning for Theorem Proving via Lean
deep_dive.abstract: While reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) typically has relied on a single binary verification signal, symbolic proof assistants in formal reasoning offer rich, fine-grained structured feedback. This gap between structured processes and unstructured rewards highlights the importance of feedback that is both dense and sound. In this work, we demonstrate that the Lean proof assistant itself can serve as a symbolic process oracle, supplying both outcome-level and fine-grained tactic-level verified feedback during training. Proof attempts are parsed into tactic sequences, and Lean's elaboration marks both locally sound steps and the earliest failing step, yielding dense, verifier-grounded credit signals rooted in type theory. We incorporate these structured rewards into a GRPO-style reinforcement learning objective with first-error propagation and first-token credit methods that balances outcome- and process-level advantages. Experiments with STP-Lean and DeepSeek-Prover-V1.5 show that tactic-level supervision outperforms outcome-only baselines in most settings, delivering improvements on benchmarks such as MiniF2F and ProofNet. Beyond empirical gains, our study highlights a broader perspective: symbolic proof assistants are not only verifiers at evaluation time, but can also act as process-level reward oracles during training. This opens a path toward reinforcement learning frameworks that combine the scalability of language models with the reliability of symbolic verification for formal reasoning.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: RL for theorem proving with fine-grained verification from Lean, directly applicable to formal verification.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用Lean的细粒度验证信号训练RL进行定理证明，直接服务于形式验证。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用Lean的细粒度验证信号训练RL进行定理证明，直接服务于形式验证。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用Lean的细粒度验证信号训练RL进行定理证明，直接服务于形式验证。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper integrates Lean proof assistant's structured feedback into reinforcement learning for theorem proving, achieving dense verifier-grounded credit signals and improved performance, which is directly applicable to automated formal verification.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对强化学习从形式验证中获取稀疏奖励的问题，提出将Lean证明助手作为符号过程预言机，在训练中提供细粒度的策略级验证反馈。该方法不仅提供结果正确性信号，还标记每一步的正确或最先失败步骤，从而生成密集的验证信号。实验表明，这种过程验证的RL有效提升了定理证明的成功率，为自动化形式验证（包括硬件模型检查）提供了新途径。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对强化学习从形式验证中获取稀疏奖励的问题，提出将Lean证明助手作为符号过程预言机，在训练中提供细粒度的策略级验证反馈。该方法不仅提供结果正确性信号，还标记每一步的正确或最先失败步骤，从而生成密集的验证信号。实验表明，这种过程验证的RL有效提升了定理证明的成功率，为自动化形式验证（包括硬件模型检查）提供了新途径。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning for model checking and formal verification

quick_skim.title: Witnesses and Counterexamples for Timed Bisimulation
quick_skim.abstract: Timed automata provide a modeling formalism for time-critical properties of reactive systems with discrete-state/continuous-time behaviors. To handle the infinite state space of timed automata, recent verification tools use zone graphs, a symbolic semantic model that guarantees sound results, at least for properties reducible to reachability problems. If we instead want to compare the behavior of two timed automata, checking for timed trace equivalence is undecidable. Fortunately, timed bisimulation equivalence is decidable, but currently available checks do not provide useful explanations of the results. To overcome this limitation, we use a recently proposed extension of zone graphs by so-called virtual clocks. The extension not only facilitates effective tool support for timed bisimilarity checking but also enables the derivation of useful explanations from the results. If timed bisimilarity holds, all witnesses derivable from the composed symbolic representation of both models are indeed valid for both models. If timed bisimilarity does not hold, we describe how to obtain counterexamples, making explicit the behavioral differences. These witnesses/counterexamples may serve as test cases in later stages of system refinement.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Timed automata verification with zone graphs and virtual clocks, applicable to hardware timing analysis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 时间自动机验证，使用区域图和虚拟时钟，可应用于硬件时序分析
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 时间自动机验证，使用区域图和虚拟时钟，可应用于硬件时序分析
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 时间自动机验证，使用区域图和虚拟时钟，可应用于硬件时序分析
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Enhances timed bisimulation checking by generating witnesses and counterexamples using virtual clocks, improving explainability for real-time systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 时间自动机的双模拟验证缺乏解释性。本文利用虚拟时钟扩展区域图，为时间双模拟关系生成见证与反例，从而提供可解释的验证结果。该方法虽面向实时系统，但其符号语义与反例生成机制可直接迁移至硬件时序验证（如数字电路时序分析）。实验表明工具能有效处理状态空间爆炸，生成有用的诊断信息。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 时间自动机的双模拟验证缺乏解释性。本文利用虚拟时钟扩展区域图，为时间双模拟关系生成见证与反例，从而提供可解释的验证结果。该方法虽面向实时系统，但其符号语义与反例生成机制可直接迁移至硬件时序验证（如数字电路时序分析）。实验表明工具能有效处理状态空间爆炸，生成有用的诊断信息。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 搜索混合硬件验证方法以及可迁移到硬件验证的软件验证技术。, especially work that connects or combines: hardware verification techniques for digital circuits; symbolic execution applied to hardware design verification; fuzzing techniques for hardware verification; hybrid verification combining formal and simulation methods; counterexample-guided inductive synthesis for hardware verification; abstract interpretation applied to hardware verification; What papers combine formal verification with simulation for hardware verification?; How are software verification techniques like symbolic execution and fuzzing adapted to hardware design verification?; What are the hybrid methods that integrate model checking with emulation or runtime verification for digital circuits?.

quick_skim.title: Verifying LTL for Infinite State Systems via Termination Analysis
quick_skim.abstract: We show that existing tools for termination analysis are extremely well suited for LTL model checking of infinite state systems. To this end, we present a framework MoAT which uses the well-known automata-based approach and reduces the LTL model checking problem to fair termination. To prove or disprove fair termination, it then calls the termination tools KoAT and LoAT in the backend. Our experiments show that in this way, MoAT is on par with existing state-of-the-art tools for LTL model checking of infinite state systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: automata-based LTL model checking via termination analysis for infinite-state systems
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过终止分析验证无限状态系统的线性时序逻辑属性
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过终止分析验证无限状态系统的线性时序逻辑属性
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过终止分析验证无限状态系统的线性时序逻辑属性
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Presents MoAT framework that reduces LTL model checking to fair termination, leveraging existing termination analyzers KoAT and LoAT.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有工具难以高效验证无限状态系统的线性时序逻辑属性。该论文提出MoAT框架，通过自动机方法将LTL模型检查问题归约为公平终止问题，并调用已有终止分析工具KoAT和LoAT来判定。实验表明MoAT在无限状态系统验证上达到与最先进工具相当的性能，为硬件形式验证中的模型检查提供了可迁移的方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有工具难以高效验证无限状态系统的线性时序逻辑属性。该论文提出MoAT框架，通过自动机方法将LTL模型检查问题归约为公平终止问题，并调用已有终止分析工具KoAT和LoAT来判定。实验表明MoAT在无限状态系统验证上达到与最先进工具相当的性能，为硬件形式验证中的模型检查提供了可迁移的方法。
